executives.name: Anthony Walsh
executives.background: Mr. Walsh is a Chartered Professional Accountant with extensive experience in the mining industry, including serving as President and CEO of Miramar Mining Corporation.

executives.name: David Fennell
executives.background: Mr. Fennell has been involved in the mining industry for over 35 years. He was the founder of Golden Star Resources Ltd. and has served on numerous boards of public mining companies.

executives.name: David Rae
executives.background: Mr. Rae was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer in May 2020. He joined DPM in 2012 as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. Prior to joining DPM, he was Vice President, Operations at Falconbridge and Xstrata Nickel.

executives.name: James Maxwell
executives.background: Mr. Maxwell is a professional geoscientist with over 20 years of experience in mineral exploration. He has held senior roles at Sabina Gold & Silver and Claude Resources.
